query: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.analysis_report, u.name as colaborador_name, u.email as colaborador_email, l.name as leader_name, l.email as leader_email FROM pdis p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leader_id = l.id WHERE p.analysis_report IS NOT NULL AND p.analysis_report != '' LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT p.id, p.title, p.analysis_report, u.name as colaborador_name, u.email as colaborador_email, l.name as leader_name, l.email as leader_email FROM pdis p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leader_id = l.id WHERE p.analysis_report IS NOT NULL AND p.analysis_report != '' LIMIT 20;
